plugins.name: rust-development-pipeline
plugins.description: Orchestrates a complete Rust development pipeline from architectural planning through code review, fix generation, and deterministic execution via TOML plans and compiled sd-based scripts

plugins.name: fortran-dev-pipeline
plugins.description: Orchestrates a complete Fortran development pipeline from architectural planning through code review, fix generation, and deterministic execution via TOML plans and compiled sd-based scripts

plugins.name: claude-code-discord-bot-hooks
plugins.description: Routes Claude Code hook events to a Discord channel — approval requests, notifications, and session stop signals — with interactive Approve/Deny buttons. Also provides slash commands to inspect active sessions and conversation history.
